findings.title: Sampler-disabled access logs take the sampled formatting path
findings.impact: When sampling is disabled, every request-context CLIENT/ACCESS record now returns true from IsCurrentRequestLogSampled, so FormatAccessReqMsg appends logSampled:true and builds an extra ostringstream/string before LogPerformance writes the line. That makes the default pass-through mode larger and more allocation-heavy on the access-log hot path, even though the sampler is supposed to add only a lightweight enabled check when disabled.
findings.fix: Preserve the previous no-marker path when the sampler is disabled, or pass the existing LogPerformance stream into the marker formatter so disabled/pass-through access logging avoids the extra string allocation and payload expansion.
